steps.title: Factor out the common term
steps.content:
Notice that both terms in $x^2 - 28x = 0$ contain a factor of $x$. Factor it out:
$$x(x - 28) = 0$$

steps.title: Apply zero product property
steps.content:
When a product equals zero, at least one factor must equal zero. Either $x = 0$ or $x - 28 = 0$.
Solving $x - 28 = 0$ gives $x = 28$.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
